name: Chicken Paprikas
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons freshly rendered lard or oil
2 Anaheim or Cubanelle peppers, seeded and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a 6-quart heavy stove-top casserole and add the lard or oil and paprika. Saute the paprika for about 1 minute.
2. Add the onions and saute for a few minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except for the thickening mixture. Bring to a simmer and cook, covered, for about 45 to 60 minutes until all is tender.
4. Remove the chicken pieces and set aside.
5. Mix the sour cream and flour well with a wire whisk. Stir in 1 cup of the juices from the pot to avoid lumps.
6. Stir this mixture into the pot and stir while it thickens.
7. Return the chicken to the pot and restore heat.
8. Serve with noodles or Hungarian dumplings.
